ast.name: desc
ast.source: Choose the AI model for transcription
ast.target: 选择用于转录的 AI 模型

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Processing silent segments can lighten speech recognition workload and reduce the amount of data sent
ast.target: 处理静音片段可减轻语音识别负载并减少发送的数据量

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Select an existing fvad.wasm to automatically place it into the plugin folder

ast.name: desc
ast.source: How to format the transcription output

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use AI to enhance transcription with related information after completion
ast.target: 完成后使用 AI 添加相关信息以增强转写内容

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically correct transcription results using dictionary-based text correction
ast.target: 使用基于词典的文本校正自动纠正转写结果

ast.name: desc

ast.target: 编辑词典以纠正语音识别错误
